title: Braintree Transaction
description: Represents a payment transaction processed through the Braintree gateway. A transaction captures the full lifecycle from authorization through settlement, refund, or void, and supports credit and debit cards, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Venmo, ACH, and SEPA payment methods.

id.description: Unique identifier for the transaction assigned by Braintree.

amount.description: The transaction amount as a decimal string in the transaction currency.

status.description: The current processing status of the transaction.

type.description: The type of transaction. 'sale' represents a charge and 'credit' represents a refund.

currency_iso_code.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the transaction.

order_id.description: Merchant-provided order identifier associated with this transaction for reconciliation.

merchant_account_id.description: Identifier of the Braintree merchant account used to process this transaction.

customer_id.description: Identifier of the customer in the Braintree Vault associated with this transaction, if applicable.

payment_method_token.description: Token of the vaulted payment method used for this transaction, if applicable.

payment_method_nonce.description: The one-time payment method nonce used for this transaction, if applicable.

processor_response_code.description: The processor-specific response code returned when the transaction was processed.

processor_response_text.description: Human-readable text description of the processor response code.

gateway_rejection_reason.description: The reason the Braintree gateway rejected the transaction, if applicable.

tax_amount.description: The tax amount included in the transaction total, as a decimal string.

shipping_amount.description: The shipping amount included in the transaction total, as a decimal string.

transaction_source.description: Indicates the origin of the transaction for network reporting requirements.

billing.description: Billing address associated with this transaction.

shipping.description: Shipping address associated with this transaction.

customer_details.description: Summary of the customer associated with this transaction.

credit_card_details.description: Masked credit or debit card details used in this transaction.

descriptor.description: Dynamic descriptor fields that appear on the customer's bank statement.

refund_ids.description: List of transaction identifiers for refund transactions created against this transaction.

items.description: Unique identifier of a refund transaction.

refunded_transaction_id.description: For refund transactions, the identifier of the original transaction being refunded.

subscription_id.description: Identifier of the subscription that generated this transaction, if applicable.

line_items.description: Line items for Level 3 processing data, up to 249 items.

disbursement_details.description: Disbursement information for when the transaction funds were or will be sent to the merchant.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the transaction was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the transaction was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

Address.description: A billing or shipping address associated with a transaction or customer.

first_name.description: First name of the address holder.

last_name.description: Last name of the address holder.

company.description: Company or organization name at this address.

extended_address.description: Secondary address line such as apartment or suite number.

locality.description: City or locality of the address.

region.description: State, province, or region code of the address.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address.

CustomerSummary.description: A summary of the customer associated with a transaction.

id.description: Unique identifier of the customer in the Braintree Vault.

CreditCardDetails.description: Masked credit or debit card details used in a transaction.

bin.description: First six digits of the card number, identifying the issuing bank and card type.

last_4.description: Last four digits of the card number.

expiration_month.description: Two-digit expiration month of the card.

expiration_year.description: Four-digit expiration year of the card.

cardholder_name.description: Name of the cardholder as it appears on the card.

country_of_issuance.description: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 country code of the card-issuing country.

token.description: Vault token for this card if it was stored during the transaction.

Descriptor.description: Dynamic descriptor fields that appear on the cardholder's bank or credit card statement.

name.description: Merchant name as it appears on the customer's statement. Maximum 22 characters.

phone.description: Merchant phone number as it appears on the customer's statement. 10–14 digits.

url.description: Merchant URL as it appears on the customer's statement. Maximum 13 characters.

LineItem.description: A single product or service line item included for Level 3 processing data.

name.description: Name or description of the product or service.

description.description: Additional description of the line item.

kind.description: Whether this item is a debit (charge) or credit (discount/refund).

quantity.description: Quantity of the line item as a decimal string.

unit_amount.description: Unit price of the line item as a decimal string.

total_amount.description: Total amount for this line item (quantity × unit_amount) as a decimal string.

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measure for the quantity, such as 'each', 'kg', or 'oz'.

commodity_code.description: Commodity code identifying the type of goods for Level 3 processing.

tax_amount.description: Tax amount for this line item as a decimal string.

discount_amount.description: Discount amount applied to this line item as a decimal string.

product_code.description: Merchant-defined product code or SKU for this line item.

url.description: URL for the product page of this line item.

DisbursementDetails.description: Details about the disbursement of transaction funds to the merchant's bank account.

disbursement_date.description: Date on which the funds were or will be disbursed to the merchant.

settlement_amount.description: Amount that was or will be disbursed, in the settlement currency.

settlement_currency_iso_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the settlement currency.

funds_held.description: If true, the funds are being held and not yet disbursed to the merchant.
